claims.claim: 香料・フレーバーの独自カプセル化技術（encapsulation technology）によるFabric Care市場でのリーダーシップ
claims.descriptive_label: プロプライエタリなフレグランスカプセル化技術
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (President Fragrances発言): 'Consumer Fragrance performance was stronger, growing 8% as Fabric Care, Home Care and Hair Care all grew double digits...This marks the 13th consecutive quarter of Consumer Fragrance growth'. Q3 2014: 'new wins in Fabric Care category, further solidifying our leadership position in this category. Our strong performance in Fabric Care, in large part, reflects market acceptance of our unique encapsulation technology'
claims.speaker: Nicolas Mirzayantz

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: Q4での13四半期連続成長という数値裏付けあり。カプセル化技術という具体的な技術的能力の言及。'market acceptance of our unique encapsulation technology'は技術（能力）が顧客支持を得ているという因果の説明。Cornered Resource的性質あり

claims.claim: 新興市場（売上の50%）における業界最大のプレゼンスと地理的多様性
claims.descriptive_label: 新興市場50%売上比率（業界最高）の地理的優位性
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO発言): 'The emerging markets, which grew 3x faster than the developed markets on a local currency basis in 2014, now represents approximately 50% of total sales, which we believe is best in class within our industry'. Q3 2014: '50% of our sales, more than any of our competitors'
claims.speaker: Andreas Fibig

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: Q4での定量的裏付けあり（50%の新興市場比率、業界最高）。競合対比での優位性を明示（'more than any of our competitors'）。ただし新興市場売上比率は結果として見ることもでき、rule_1_t はやや不完全

claims.claim: Flavors部門のLatech America市場での技術駆動型新規獲得能力
claims.descriptive_label: ラテンアメリカにおける技術主導の顧客新規獲得力
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (President Flavors発言): 'Latin America continues to be our strongest-performing region, up 13% on a local currency basis, as a result of our successful delivery systems. This marks the fifth consecutive quarter of double-digit growth, which is a clear indication of the value innovation has on our business'
claims.speaker: Matthias Haeni

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: Q4での5四半期連続二桁成長という数値。ただし'delivery systems'という能力の説明は具体性が不十分。競合（Givaudan, Firmenich等）との差別化データなし

claims.claim: R&D投資（売上の8-9%）に支えられたイノベーションパイプラインの継続的構築能力
claims.descriptive_label: 持続的R&D投資によるイノベーション優位性
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CFO発言): 'R&D as a percent of sales remained within our 8% to 9% target range at 8.2% of sales'. CEO発言: 'Our emphasis on R&D has resulted in a stronger pipeline of innovation...Our strong cash flow position provides us with the financial flexibility to continue to invest in growth-enhancing R&D'
claims.speaker: Andreas Fibig

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: Q4での言及。売上8-9%のR&D投資は業界平均との比較データが示されていれば高評価だが、競合との相対的優位性が不明。新製品キャプチャ率等の定量指標なし

claims.claim: 消費者インサイトとコラボレーション能力による顧客との長期的パートナーシップ
claims.descriptive_label: 顧客密着型の消費者インサイト提供能力
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO発言): 'We have a well-balanced geographic profile, a diverse product portfolio and a very strong innovation pipeline that sets us apart from the competition'. Q3 2014: 'our investment and expertise in consumer insights' and 'new tools such as trend evaluation, powerful programs to help our customers win in the marketplace by identifying key consumer trends at the very early stage'
claims.speaker: Andreas Fibig

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: 'sets us apart from the competition'は自己申告。具体的な定量的裏付けなし。消費者インサイト能力は業界共通の言説に近い（rule_3違反リスク）

claims.claim: Aromor買収による特殊成分・天然素材のCornered Resource的ポジション
claims.descriptive_label: Aromor統合による天然香料成分の希少資源アクセス
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CFO発言): 'Fragrance Ingredients, which benefited from the addition of Aromor, was up 18% in 2014'. CEO: 'Aromor and IFF have helped each other more than originally envisioned. We are commercializing innovative solutions, such as our proprietary FlavorFit brand and our fragrance encapsulation technology. We are also partnering with biotech firms to have accesses to sustainable source of cost-effective ingredients'
claims.speaker: Andreas Fibig

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: Q4での言及。Aromor統合+18%成長という数値あり。天然素材の持続可能な調達という方向性は将来的な希少資源アクセスにつながる可能性あるが、現時点での競争優位性としての確信度は中程度

claims.claim: カプセル化技術・Consumer Fragrances成長 → 新興市場拡大 → 売上CAGR 4-6%
claims.descriptive_label: 技術主導の新興市場成長→売上CAGR

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: Q4での説明。ローカル通貨売上4-6%成長という長期目標が開示されており検証可能。カプセル化技術→Consumer Fragrance成長→新規顧客獲得は2ステップの因果チェーン

claims.claim: 新興市場50%→3x成長率格差活用→ローカル通貨成長 4-6%持続
claims.descriptive_label: 新興市場成長率優位性→売上成長持続

rule_evaluation.overall_reasoning: Q4での説明。新興市場成長率が先進市場の3倍という具体的な数値。業界最高の50%新興市場比率は直接的なCAGR接続

claims.claim: 2014年通年ローカル通貨売上5%成長（長期目標内）、調整後EPS 14%増（$5.08、過去最高）、5年で4回長期目標達成
